description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named misc-tests that runs on pull requests, pushes, and daily on a schedule. The workflow has read permissions for repository contents and uses bash as the default shell. It consists of four jobs: test-sdist, test-cmake-import, test-serializer-compatibility, and test-custom-libpath. Each job runs on ubuntu-latest or a matrix of ubuntu-latest and macos-latest, checks out the repository with submodules, sets up Miniforge3 with a dev environment, and runs a specific test script.
